local_dev.summary: Canonical local operator/dev loop: launch the dashboard-backed runtime surface.

verify.summary: Canonical full local verification path: run the root verify pipeline.

tooling_fast.summary: Fast manifest-driven tooling profile for local policy/boundary sanity checks.

ci.summary: Canonical CI-equivalent entrypoint, aligned to the root verify pipeline.

lane_run.summary: Indexed lane entrypoint: execute a registered lane without keeping one root package alias per lane.

lane_test_run.summary: Indexed lane test entrypoint: run lane regression coverage through the shared lane registry.

namespace_descriptions.workspace: Canonical repository entrypoints and generated command discovery.
namespace_descriptions.ops: Governance gates, audits, operator lanes, and policy checks.
namespace_descriptions.test: Regression suites and targeted test commands.
namespace_descriptions.dashboard: Dashboard runtime, snapshot, and UI interaction surfaces.
namespace_descriptions.build: System build and runtime packaging flows.
namespace_descriptions.runtime: Runtime mode/cutover management and distribution verification.
namespace_descriptions.security: Security, integrity, and formal verification operators.
namespace_descriptions.state: State kernel migration, replay, and cutover flows.
